mapper.select:
select * from tbl_user_share where 1=1
and user_id = #{params.userId}
and exists(select 1 from tbl_dish where tbl_dish.id = tbl_user_share.dish_id and tbl_dish.name like concat('%',#{params.dishName},'%'))
and exists(select 1 from tbl_user where tbl_user.id = tbl_user_share.user_id and tbl_user.user_name like concat('%',#{params.userName},'%'))
order by create_time desc
